finding.root_cause_summary: The child module `itf-chartizate-api/pom.xml` (lines 7-9) pins three custom properties — `maven-compiler-plugin-api.source`, `maven-compiler-plugin-api.target`, and `maven-compiler-plugin.compilerVersion` — to the literal value `"1.8"`. These properties are wired into the maven-compiler-plugin configuration at lines 137-140. After the `upgrade_plugins_for_java17` recipe bumped the plugin from 3.8.0 to 3.11.0, the newer plugin (running under JDK 11+) no longer accepts the legacy `"1.x"` version string format and throws `NumberFormatException: For input string: "1.8"` when it tries to parse the value as a raw integer.
cited_files: itf-chartizate-api/pom.xml (lines 7-9: property definitions; lines 134-140: maven-compiler-plugin configuration referencing those properties)
pom.xml (lines 42-44: parent-level maven-compiler-plugin properties set to 11, but overridden by child's differently-named properties)
finding.fix_hint: In itf-chartizate-api/pom.xml lines 7-9, change all three property values from "1.8" to "21" (or at minimum "8" to restore the bare-integer format the newer plugin expects).
